author: Jdthomas24
description: Custom Hubitat driver for SmartThings Zigbee motion sensors with local processing and battery reporting.
releaseNotes:
v1.7.2
- Debug logging auto-disables after 30 minutes (default now off)
- Presence logging fully suppressed when Enable Presence Detection is off
- Temperature log suppressed when Enable Temperature Reporting is off
- Refined battery voltage curve for CR2450/CR2477 coin cells (more accurate mid-range reporting)
- Motion reset time validated against zero or negative values
- Stale motion reset timer cleared when settings are saved
- checkinHistory list trimmed on read to prevent state bloat after hub restart
